interface.name: hal_calibrated_sensor
interface.details: This interface represents a generic sensor exposing bias and sensitivity calibration controls.

method.name: halCalibratedSensorSetBias
method.brief: Updates sensor bias data from received buffer.
method.note: The bias buffer must have the same length of the sensor channels number.
method.param: Pointer to a buffer of bias values.
method.retval: if one or more errors occurred.

method.name: halCalibratedSensorResetBias
method.brief: Reset sensor bias data restoring it to zero.
method.retval: if one or more errors occurred.

method.name: halCalibratedSensorSetSensitivity
method.brief: Updates sensor sensitivity data from received buffer.
method.note: The sensitivity buffer must have the same length of the sensor channels number.
method.param: Pointer to a buffer of sensitivity values.
method.retval: if one or more errors occurred.

method.name: halCalibratedSensorResetSensitivity
method.brief: Reset sensor sensitivity data restoring it to its typical value.
method.retval: if one or more errors occurred.
